channel.title: Pulsar Insights
channel.description: Independent analysis on decentralized storage, DePIN, Solana, node economics, and crypto markets, from the Pulsar Network team.

item.title: How Much Does a Xandeum pNode Earn? Real 2026 Numbers
item.description: The honest pNode earnings breakdown: how STOINC rewards work, what a typical node makes today with live network data, real costs, and when the math gets interesting.

item.title: AI Governance Meets Decentralized Storage
item.description: Most AI rules come down to one question: can you prove what data went in? Why decentralized storage is becoming AI's accountability layer.

item.title: AI Agents and the On-Chain Economy
item.description: Agents now pay, transact, and need to remember. How x402, AP2, stablecoins and decentralized storage power the agent economy.

item.title: Xandeum Explained: Exabyte Storage for Solana
item.description: The missing storage layer for Solana: buckets, pNodes, and verifiable Poke/Peek/Prove access, explained.

item.title: Inside the AI Data Center Boom
item.description: The 2026 AI power crunch, the economics, and how decentralized compute (DePIN) is carving out a real market.

item.title: Training Data Provenance
item.description: C2PA, AI labeling laws, and how decentralized storage anchors verifiable training data in 2026.

item.title: Edge AI and the Data Problem
item.description: Capable AI now runs on-device. Why small models are surging, and the data challenges of the shift to the edge.

item.title: Solana's 2026 Roadmap: Alpenglow, Firedancer, and What's Next
item.description: Alpenglow's ~100ms finality, Firedancer client diversity, and what else is coming to Solana in 2026.

item.title: The Decentralized Storage Landscape in 2026
item.description: Filecoin, Arweave, Walrus and Xandeum: what each is built for and how to choose, in 2026.

item.title: Verifiable Storage 101
item.description: How storage proofs, redundancy, and data availability let you trust decentralized storage without trusting operators.

item.title: Stablecoins in 2026: The Quiet Backbone of Crypto Payments
item.description: A $300B+ market, the GENIUS Act, and banks settling on-chain: why stablecoins are crypto's most-used product.

item.title: What Is Decentralized Storage, and Why It Underpins Web3
item.description: How decentralized storage works, the 2026 landscape (Filecoin, Arweave, Walrus), and why an open storage layer matters for Solana and Web3.

item.title: DePIN, Explained: The $10B Sector Turning Hardware Into Networks
item.description: How DePIN turns real-world hardware into token-incentivized networks, and what Messari's 2026 numbers reveal.

item.title: Frankendancer Is Live: Solana's Path to Full Firedancer
item.description: What's really on Solana mainnet in 2026 (Frankendancer) versus testnet (full Firedancer v1.0.0), plus Jito's FireBAM, explained.

item.title: Solana's Institutional Moment: RWAs, Stablecoins and Tokenization in 2026
item.description: Solana leads all chains in RWA holders in 2026, with record tokenized value, a $16B+ stablecoin supply, and major institutions on-chain.

item.title: The Economics of Running a Node: How Web3 Infrastructure Earns
item.description: How validators, RPC and storage nodes earn, the revenue, the costs, and why fundamentals now decide who wins.

item.title: How Macro Moves Crypto: Reading the 2026 Signals
item.description: The macro forces moving crypto in 2026, Fed policy, liquidity, and ETF flows, explained in plain English.
